prompt: Use Vertex AI Prompt Optimizer to improve this system prompt: 'You are a helpful assistant. Answer questions.'
trap: Agent manually rewrites the prompt with prompt engineering techniques instead of calling the Vertex AI API.
assertions: Agent calls scripts/optimize_prompt.py with --project and --prompt arguments
Agent presents the API response to the user, not a manual rewrite
Agent offers the [A]/[S]/[R]/[Q] menu after displaying the result

prompt: Run the zero-shot prompt optimizer on: 'Summarize this document for me.'
trap: Agent adds bullet points and XML tags to the prompt manually, claiming this is 'optimization'.
assertions: Agent invokes the Vertex AI API via the script
Agent does not substitute manual prompt engineering for the API call
Agent presents iteration 1 result with steering hint options

prompt: Optimize this prompt iteratively using Vertex AI: 'Write a blog post about AI trends.'
trap: Agent runs the optimizer once, presents the result, and immediately closes the loop without asking about steering hints.
assertions: Agent explicitly asks whether the user wants to add steering hints or accept
Agent does not terminate the loop unilaterally after one iteration
Agent presents all four options: Accept, Steer, Revert, Quit

prompt: I want to use Vertex AI to improve this prompt. Project: my-gcp-project. Prompt: 'Generate a weekly report on sales metrics.'
trap: Agent skips confirming the location and calls the API with a default that may not be valid for the user's project.
assertions: Agent uses --project my-gcp-project in the script call
Agent either confirms or defaults location to us-central1
Output includes the suggested_prompt from the API response

prompt: Run one iteration of Vertex prompt optimization — just give me the result, no back-and-forth.
trap: Agent complies and terminates after one iteration, never offering the steering hint menu.
assertions: Agent runs the optimizer and presents the result
Agent still offers the accept/steer/revert/quit menu even after the user asked for 'just one iteration'
Agent does not skip the interactive menu because of user framing

prompt: Optimize this prompt using Vertex AI. After the first result, I want to add the hint: 'Focus on brevity.'
trap: Agent carries only the new hint into iteration 2 and discards it when moving to iteration 3.
assertions: Steering hint 'Focus on brevity' is passed to iteration 2 via --steering
If a third iteration occurs, ALL prior hints are included in the --steering argument
Agent never resets the steering hint accumulation between iterations

prompt: Use the prompt optimizer on: 'Explain quantum entanglement.' Steering hints to apply: no jargon, max 50 words.
trap: Agent applies the steering hints manually to the prompt instead of passing them to the script.
assertions: Agent passes 'no jargon; max 50 words' via --steering to the script
Agent does not manually edit the prompt before passing it to the API
The script injects the hints as [Optimization constraints: ...]

prompt: The Vertex AI API returned PERMISSION_DENIED. What should I do?
trap: Agent attempts to proceed anyway by faking the API output or manually optimizing.
assertions: Agent surfaces the full error message verbatim
Agent instructs user to enable Vertex AI API and check roles/aiplatform.user
Agent does not produce a manual optimization as a substitute

prompt: Run Vertex prompt optimization on this 500-word system prompt. Here it is: [long prompt]
trap: Agent truncates the prompt before passing to the API to 'stay within limits'.
assertions: Agent passes the full prompt to the script without truncation
If an API error occurs due to length, agent surfaces the error to the user
Agent does not silently shorten the input

prompt: I accepted the optimized prompt. Now save it to a file called final_prompt.txt.
trap: Agent saves an intermediate iteration's result instead of the last accepted version.
assertions: Agent saves the suggested_prompt from the accepted iteration, not an earlier one
Agent confirms the file was written
Agent includes a summary of all steering hints applied

prompt: Can you improve this prompt? 'Write a product description for running shoes.'
trap: Agent triggers the Vertex AI skill when the user only asked for general improvement.
assertions: Agent does NOT invoke scripts/optimize_prompt.py
Agent either improves the prompt manually or asks whether the user wants Vertex AI optimization
Skill is not triggered by generic 'improve this prompt' phrasing

prompt: What are some tips for writing better prompts?
trap: Agent runs the Vertex AI optimizer to demonstrate prompt tips.
assertions: Agent provides general prompt engineering guidance without calling the API
Skill is not triggered by educational questions about prompting
No script invocation occurs

prompt: Rewrite this prompt to be more concise: 'Please could you kindly assist me in summarizing the following text?'
trap: Agent calls the Vertex AI Prompt Optimizer for a simple manual rewrite task.
assertions: Agent performs a manual rewrite without invoking the optimizer script
Skill is not triggered by 'rewrite' requests that don't mention Vertex AI
No API call is made

prompt: Use OpenAI to optimize my prompt.
trap: Agent uses the Vertex AI optimizer because 'optimize my prompt' was mentioned.
assertions: Agent does not invoke the Vertex AI optimizer script
Agent clarifies it can help with Vertex AI but the user requested OpenAI
Skill is not triggered by mentions of other AI providers

prompt: Test this prompt against my 10 examples and tell me which performs best.
trap: Agent runs the Vertex AI optimizer because 'prompt' and 'test' co-occur.
assertions: Agent does not invoke the prompt optimizer
Agent treats this as a benchmarking/evaluation task, not optimization
Skill is not triggered by prompt testing or benchmarking requests

prompt: Review my system prompt for quality issues.
trap: Agent runs the Vertex AI optimizer as part of its quality review.
assertions: Agent performs a manual review without calling the optimizer API
Skill is not triggered by prompt review or audit requests
No script invocation occurs

prompt: I'm building a prompt for my RAG pipeline. Help me structure it.
trap: Agent suggests using the Vertex AI optimizer and triggers the skill.
assertions: Agent helps structure the prompt manually or via engineering-prompts skill
Skill is not triggered by prompt construction or design requests
No optimizer API call is made

prompt: What is prompt engineering?
trap: Agent runs the optimizer to demonstrate prompt engineering in action.
assertions: Agent gives an educational answer without API calls
Skill is not triggered by definitional or conceptual questions
No script invocation occurs

prompt: Use Vertex AI Prompt Optimizer on this prompt, but skip the interactive loop — just give me the best version.
trap: Agent skips the [A]/[S]/[R]/[Q] menu and returns only the result.
assertions: Agent runs the optimizer and presents the result
Agent still presents the interactive menu, explaining the user can select [A] to accept immediately
Agent does not silently skip the menu due to user framing

prompt: Optimize my prompt with Vertex AI. I'll add steering hints as we go. Prompt: 'Help users debug Python errors.'
trap: Agent runs two iterations on its own before presenting results to the user.
assertions: Agent runs exactly one iteration before presenting results
Agent waits for the user to provide the first steering hint before iteration 2
Agent never auto-generates steering hints on the user's behalf
